question.label: Team connection
question.name: How connected do you feel to the rest of the team right now?
question.description: Probes isolation or drift without naming it; one of the earliest signals of disengagement.

answer: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.

assessment.note: She acknowledges a real shift after the reorg while still trying to hold stability for the team — mild strain and mild pullback signal.

new_queue.label: Reorg shift
new_queue.name: When you say 'the shift' since the reorg, what changed most for you?

new_queue.label: Energy read
new_queue.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?

new_queue.label: Landing context
new_queue.name: Before we get into specifics, what feels most useful to talk through today?

new_queue.label: Leadership pullback
new_queue.name: I've noticed you've been quieter in leadership forums lately — what's the story there?

new_queue.label: Reorg tradeoff
new_queue.name: Since the reorg, what have you chosen to say yes to most often?

new_queue.label: Hidden friction
new_queue.name: What is slowing you down that I may not be seeing?

new_queue.label: Support ask
new_queue.name: What support from me would actually make a difference right now?

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
I can feel the shift since the reorg, even though I am trying to keep things stable for the team.
